verdict_reasoning: IZUMO1 is a single-pass transmembrane protein with an extracellular immunoglobulin-like domain. It is essential for sperm-egg plasma membrane binding and fusion, functions as a ligand for the oocyte receptor JUNO, and is constitutively surface-localized on sperm via its own transmembrane anchor. The protein body is stably accessible from the extracellular face.
